title: deer-flow.council.completed v1
description: All council agents reached verdicts and the council session is closed. Carry the aggregate cost and disagreement signal so dashboards can track council quality without re-fetching individual agent results.

verdict_summary.description: One-line summary of the final council verdict

cost_usd_total.description: Sum of all agent costs in USD

token_total.description: Sum of input + output tokens across all agents

disagreement_count.description: Number of agents whose verdict differed from the majority

agent_results.description: Per-agent summary (optional — omit for very large councils)
